timeline.title: Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology
timeline.company: Madan Mohan Malaviya University of Technology
achievements: Completed Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology with a CGPA of 8.30
Built strong foundations in backend development, data structures, databases, and software engineering
Worked on academic and industrial backend projects using Java, Spring Boot, MySQL, JPA, REST APIs, and FastAPI
timeline.impact: Built strong backend engineering fundamentals through academic training and hands-on development projects.

timeline.title: Software Developer Intern
achievements: Worked on Tata Play Binge, contributing to CMS enhancements, backend offer configurations, and new content-type integrations
Integrated Mixpanel and CleverTap analytics events across modules to improve product tracking and user insights
Integrated Apple Music functionality including APIs, token handling, and secure content access
Collaborated on backend feature development and production-level workflows
timeline.impact: Contributed to production CMS systems, analytics integrations, and third-party service integrations in a large-scale OTT platform.

timeline.title: Software Developer
achievements: Developing scalable backend systems using Java, Spring Boot, JPA, and REST APIs
Focused on clean architecture, maintainable code, and production-ready backend solutions
Enhanced CMS modules with new content types, offer configurations, validations, and editorial workflow improvements
Optimized Tata Play CDMS coupon generation workflows from 2–3 hours for 20K coupons to 2–3 minutes for 100K coupons
Reduced coupon export processing time from 2–5 minutes for 15K coupons to nearly 25 seconds for 100K coupons
Worked on backend performance optimization, debugging, and deployment-related tasks
timeline.impact: Currently building and optimizing high-scale backend systems focused on performance, scalability, and production reliability.

timeline.title: Backend Engineer
achievements: Continue building scalable distributed backend systems
Work on microservices architecture and high-performance APIs
Contribute to reliable production systems with strong engineering practices
